description: Stable diagnostic identifiers emitted by the gaussian-ply plugin. Codes are never renumbered or reused; messages may be reworded. Every message starts with its bracketed code, e.g. "[GSPLY-E003] ...".

diagnostics.summary: The file is a valid PLY file but not a supported Gaussian Splatting dialect.
diagnostics.action: Export the asset as a Graphdeco-style Gaussian PLY (scale_*, rot_*, opacity, f_dc_* vertex properties).

diagnostics.summary: The vertex element declares zero particles.
diagnostics.action: Provide a file containing at least one Gaussian.

diagnostics.summary: A required vertex property is missing.
diagnostics.action: The message names the property; re-export with the full Graphdeco property set.

diagnostics.summary: A required or SH vertex property has an unsupported type (list or unknown scalar).
diagnostics.action: Re-export with scalar numeric vertex properties.

diagnostics.summary: An f_rest_* property name is not a valid numeric SH index.
diagnostics.action: Rename or remove the malformed property; indices must be plain non-negative integers.

diagnostics.summary: An SH property index is declared more than once.
diagnostics.action: Remove the duplicate f_rest_* declaration.

diagnostics.summary: The f_rest_* indices are not contiguous from zero.
diagnostics.action: Provide every index 0..N-1; gaps make the channel layout ambiguous.

diagnostics.summary: The f_rest_* property count is not divisible by three RGB channels.
diagnostics.action: Provide 3*K rest properties for K rest coefficients per channel.

diagnostics.summary: The SH coefficient count does not correspond to a whole degree.
diagnostics.action: Valid per-channel coefficient counts are 1, 4, 9, or 16 (degrees 0-3).

diagnostics.summary: A position, scale, rotation, opacity, or DC value is non-finite or outside float range.
diagnostics.action: Clean the asset; NaN or infinite source values are never imported.

diagnostics.summary: An SH rest coefficient is non-finite.
diagnostics.action: Clean the asset; NaN or infinite source values are never imported.

diagnostics.summary: A log-space scale overflows when converted to linear space.
diagnostics.action: The stored scale exponent is implausibly large; re-export or repair the asset.

diagnostics.summary: A rotation quaternion is invalid (non-finite).
diagnostics.action: Clean the asset; near-zero quaternions are tolerated and replaced with identity (GSPLY-W002).

diagnostics.summary: A vertex property is missing from the payload or its count does not match the vertex declaration.
diagnostics.action: The file is inconsistent or truncated; re-export it.

diagnostics.summary: The PLY container itself could not be read.
diagnostics.action: The wrapped message carries the parser detail; the file is unreadable, truncated, or not PLY.

diagnostics.summary: The decoded Gaussian cloud failed structural validation.
diagnostics.action: Internal consistency check; report the asset if this occurs on a file other tools accept.

diagnostics.summary: An import entry point was called with a null output parameter.
diagnostics.action: Programming error in the host, not a property of the asset.

diagnostics.summary: The in-memory USD stage for authoring could not be created.
diagnostics.action: Indicates a broken USD environment rather than a broken asset.

diagnostics.summary: The /Asset or /Asset/Splat prim could not be defined.
diagnostics.action: Indicates a broken USD environment rather than a broken asset.

diagnostics.summary: A Gaussian attribute could not be authored.
diagnostics.action: Indicates a broken USD environment rather than a broken asset.

diagnostics.summary: The computed extent exceeds float range.
diagnostics.action: Positions or scales are implausibly large; repair the asset or import with scaleMultiplier.

diagnostics.summary: A file-format argument has an invalid value.
diagnostics.action: shDegree takes an integer in [0,3], opacityThreshold a number in [0,1], scaleMultiplier a finite number > 0.

diagnostics.summary: opacityThreshold removed every Gaussian in the file.
diagnostics.action: Lower the threshold; an empty import is treated as an error, not an empty stage.

diagnostics.summary: Writing USD back to Gaussian PLY is unsupported.
diagnostics.action: The plugin is read-only by design; see the write-support design policy.

diagnostics.summary: Non-unit rotation quaternions were normalized during import.
diagnostics.action: Informational; the count of affected Gaussians is included.

diagnostics.summary: Zero-length rotation quaternions were replaced with identity.
diagnostics.action: Informational; the count of affected Gaussians is included.

diagnostics.summary: Unrecognized vertex properties were ignored.
diagnostics.action: Informational; unknown properties are tolerated and skipped.
